controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: 1These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all-india financial institutions (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'aifis' and individually as 'an aifi') viz
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to All-India Financial Institutions (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and individually as 'an AIFI') viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all-india financial institutions (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'aifis' and individually as 'an aifi') viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'debtor company' means any company to which the regulated entity (re) currently has or previously had a
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Debtor company' means any company to which the regulated entity (RE)
currently has or previously had a loan or investment exposure (excluding
equity instruments) anytime during the preceding twelve months;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'debtor company' means any company to which the regulated entity (re) currently has or previously had a

controls.control_objective: To ensure equity shares, compulsorily convertible preference shares (ccps) and compulsorily convertible debentures (ccd)
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Equity instrument' means equity shares, compulsorily convertible
preference shares (CCPS) and compulsorily convertible debentures (CCD);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to equity shares, compulsorily convertible preference shares (ccps) and compulsorily convertible debentures (ccd)

controls.control_objective: To ensure the total regulatory capital of an aifi, fulfilling the criteria defined in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - prudential n
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Capital funds' means the total regulatory capital of an AIFI, fulfilling the
criteria defined in the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions
- Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025, as per the last
audited balance sheet;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the total regulatory capital of an aifi, fulfilling the criteria defined in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - prudential n

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it under clause (27) of section 2 of the companies act, 2013 as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
<image>
(4) 'Control' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under clause (27)
of Section 2 of the Companies Act, 2013 as amended from time to time;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it under clause (27) of section 2 of the companies act, 2013 as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company engaged in the 'business of financial services'
controls.control_description:
(5) 'Financial services company' means a company engaged in the 'business
of financial services'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company engaged in the 'business of financial services'

controls.control_objective: To ensure include -
controls.control_description: Explanation: The 'business of financial services' shall include -
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include -

controls.control_objective: To ensure be read with the extant prudential norms on exposures for the aifis
controls.control_description:
The following instructions shall be read with the extant prudential norms on
Exposures for the AIFIs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be read with the extant prudential norms on exposures for the aifis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required if the investments in the financial services companies are held under the "held for trading" category as stipulated in the reserve bank of
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Prior approval of the RBI shall not be required if the
investments in the financial services companies are held under the
"Held for Trading" category as stipulated in the Reserve Bank of India
(All India Financial Institutions - Classification, Valuation and
Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025, as updated from
time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required if the investments in the financial services companies are held under the "held for trading" category as stipulated in the reserve bank of

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an investment in a category iii aif
controls.control_description: Provided that, no AIFI shall make an investment in a Category III AIF.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an investment in a category iii aif

controls.control_objective: To ensure be restricted to the regulatory minima prescribed by sebi
controls.control_description:
Investment by an AIFI's subsidiary in a Category III AIF shall be restricted
to the regulatory minima prescribed by SEBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be restricted to the regulatory minima prescribed by sebi

controls.control_objective: To ensure ascertain the risks arising on account of equity investments in alternative investment funds done directly or through their subsidiaries, within the i
controls.control_description:
Note: AIFIs shall ascertain the risks arising on account of equity
investments in Alternative Investment Funds done directly or through their
subsidiaries, within the Internal Capital Adequacy Assessment Process
(ICAAP) framework and determine the additional capital required which will
be subject to supervisory examination as part of Supervisory Review and
Evaluation Process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ascertain the risks arising on account of equity investments in alternative investment funds done directly or through their subsidiaries, within the i

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate policies, with the approval of their board, covering the following aspects of investments in financial entities to the extent these are not
controls.control_description:
AIFIs shall formulate policies, with the approval of their Board, covering the
following aspects of investments in financial entities to the extent these are not
covered under the cross-holding limits prescribed under the Large Exposure
Norms, under Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions -
Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to formulate policies, with the approval of their board, covering the following aspects of investments in financial entities to the extent these are not

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the following limits in terms of percentage of the paid-up capital and reserves of the aifi as per the last audited balance sheet or a subse
controls.control_description:
AIFIs shall adhere to the following limits in terms of percentage of the paid-up
capital and reserves of the AIFI as per the last audited balance sheet or a
subsequent balance sheet, whichever is lower,
(1) Investment in equity of a single financial services entity which is not an
affiliate of the AIFI;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the following limits in terms of percentage of the paid-up capital and reserves of the aifi as per the last audited balance sheet or a subse

controls.control_objective: To ensure , without the prior approval of the rbi, make: (1) investment in a subsidiary and a financial services company that is not a subsidiary
controls.control_description:
No AIFI shall, without the prior approval of the RBI, make:
(1) Investment in a subsidiary and a financial services company that is not a
subsidiary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , without the prior approval of the rbi, make: (1) investment in a subsidiary and a financial services company that is not a subsidiary

controls.control_objective: To ensure be necessary in the following circumstances: <image>
controls.control_description:
Provided that, such prior approval shall not be necessary in the following
circumstances:
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be necessary in the following circumstances: <image>

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly adhere to the limits, both at an individual and aggregate level, on investments in subsidiaries, financial and non-financial entities prescri
controls.control_description:
AIFIs shall strictly adhere to the limits, both at an individual and aggregate level,
on investments in subsidiaries, financial and non-financial entities prescribed
under Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Prudential Norms
on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025 read with Reserve Bank of India (All India
Financial Institutions - Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strictly adhere to the limits, both at an individual and aggregate level, on investments in subsidiaries, financial and non-financial entities prescri

controls.control_objective: To ensure have suitable provisions governing its investments in an aif scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations
controls.control_description:
An AIFI's investment policy shall have suitable provisions governing its
investments in an AIF Scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have suitable provisions governing its investments in an aif scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of an aif scheme
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall not individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of an
AIF Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of an aif scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme
controls.control_description:
The aggregate contribution by all Regulated Entities (REs) in any AIF Scheme
shall not be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean: (1) commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks)
controls.control_description:
In this context, 'RE' shall mean:
(1) Commercial Banks (including Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean: (1) commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to make 100 percent provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the aif scheme
controls.control_description:
Where an AIFI contributes more than five percent of the corpus of an AIF Scheme
that has downstream investment (excluding equity instruments) in a debtor
company of the AIFI, the AIFI shall be required to make 100 percent provision to
the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the AIF
Scheme, subject to a cap equivalent to AIFI's direct loan and / or investment
exposure to the said debtor company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to make 100 percent provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the aif scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure deduct the entire investment from its capital funds ‒ proportionately from both tier-1 and tier-2 capital (wherever applicable)
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the provisions of paragraph 14 above, where an AIFI's
contribution is in the form of subordinated units, it shall deduct the entire
investment from its capital funds ‒ proportionately from both Tier-1 and Tier-2
capital (wherever applicable).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deduct the entire investment from its capital funds ‒ proportionately from both tier-1 and tier-2 capital (wherever applicable)

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in consultation with the government of india, by way of a notification, exempt certain aifs (annex-i) from the scope of these directions on aif contained in part a.3 of chapter ii
controls.control_description:
3The RBI may, in consultation with the Government of India, by way of a
notification, exempt certain AIFs (Annex-I) from the scope of these Directions on
AIF contained in Part A.3 of Chapter II, except for paragraph 11 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in consultation with the government of india, by way of a notification, exempt certain aifs (annex-i) from the scope of these directions on aif contained in part a.3 of chapter ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit an application through pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
An AIFI desirous of making an investment or undertaking any business that
requires prior approval / no-objection of RBI shall submit an application through
PRAVAAH Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to the Department of Regulation
(DoR), Central Office, RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit an application through pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain an 'arm's length' relationship with the subsidiary sponsored by it and evolve the following supervisory strategies: (1) the board of the pare
controls.control_description:
A parent / sponsor AIFI shall maintain an 'arm's length' relationship with the
subsidiary sponsored by it and evolve the following supervisory strategies:
(1) The Board of the parent / sponsor AIFI shall review the working of
subsidiaries at periodical intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain an 'arm's length' relationship with the subsidiary sponsored by it and evolve the following supervisory strategies: (1) the board of the pare

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake inspection/audit of the books of accounts of the subsidiaries at periodical intervals
controls.control_description:
(2) The parent / sponsor AIFI shall undertake inspection/audit of the books of
accounts of the subsidiaries at periodical intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake inspection/audit of the books of accounts of the subsidiaries at periodical intervals

controls.control_objective: To ensure set up another subsidiary or promote a new company which is not a subsidiary thereof, or undertake any new business without prior approval of the rbi
controls.control_description:
(3) The subsidiary shall not set up another subsidiary or promote a new
company which is not a subsidiary thereof, or undertake any new business
without prior approval of the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set up another subsidiary or promote a new company which is not a subsidiary thereof, or undertake any new business without prior approval of the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean expansion into the same line of business that is already permitted/approved to be undertaken
controls.control_description:
Explanation: 'New Business' shall not mean expansion into the same line of
business that is already permitted/approved to be undertaken.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean expansion into the same line of business that is already permitted/approved to be undertaken

controls.control_objective: To ensure make any portfolio investment in another existing company with an intention of acquiring controlling interest, without prior approval of the rbi
controls.control_description:
(4) The subsidiary shall not make any portfolio investment in another existing
company with an intention of acquiring controlling interest, without prior
approval of the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make any portfolio investment in another existing company with an intention of acquiring controlling interest, without prior approval of the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the investments made by a category i and ii aif set up by a subsidiary
controls.control_description:
This shall not apply to the investments made by a
Category I and II AIF set up by a subsidiary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the investments made by a category i and ii aif set up by a subsidiary

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any on-line access to customers' accounts maintained with the aifi
controls.control_description:
(5) A subsidiary shall not have any on-line access to customers' accounts
maintained with the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any on-line access to customers' accounts maintained with the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shared subject to maintaining arm's length relationship
controls.control_description:
The information between an AIFI and its subsidiary
may be shared subject to maintaining arm's length relationship.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shared subject to maintaining arm's length relationship

controls.control_objective: To ensure grant any unsecured advances to the subsidiary without prior approval of the rbi
controls.control_description:
(6) The AIFI shall not grant any unsecured advances to the subsidiary without
prior approval of the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to grant any unsecured advances to the subsidiary without prior approval of the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at arm's length
controls.control_description: (7) Transactions between an AIFI and its subsidiary shall be at arm's length.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at arm's length

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given to the subsidiary vis-à-vis a counterparty with similar risk characteristics
controls.control_description:
No preferential treatment shall be given to the subsidiary vis-à-vis a
counterparty with similar risk characteristics.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given to the subsidiary vis-à-vis a counterparty with similar risk characteristics

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the following directions regarding dealing in financial derivative products by its foreign branches / subsidiaries
controls.control_description:
An AIFI, including those operating in International Financial Services Centers
(IFSCs) in India such as Gujarat International Finance Tec City (GIFT City), shall
comply with the following directions regarding dealing in financial derivative
products by its foreign branches / subsidiaries.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the following directions regarding dealing in financial derivative products by its foreign branches / subsidiaries

controls.control_objective: To ensure also deal in financial derivative products, including structured financial derivative products, which are not available or are not permitted by the rb
controls.control_description:
Further, the branches / subsidiaries, if any, of AIFIs operating in IFSCs including
those operating out of GIFT City may also deal in financial derivative products,
including structured financial derivative products, which are not available or are
not permitted by the RBI in the domestic market subject to compliance with all
applicable laws / regulations and conditions stipulated in paragraph 25 below and
those prescribed by the host regulator.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also deal in financial derivative products, including structured financial derivative products, which are not available or are not permitted by the rb

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that: (1) dealing in such products is done with the prior approval from their board and
controls.control_description:
While allowing branches / subsidiaries in foreign jurisdictions as well as in IFSCs
to deal in such products, the parent AIFI shall ensure that:
(1) dealing in such products is done with the prior approval from their Board
and, if required, the appropriate authority in the concerned jurisdictions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that: (1) dealing in such products is done with the prior approval from their board and

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide information about dealing in such financial products as <image> may be specified by the rbi in the manner and format and within the time frame
controls.control_description:
They shall provide information about dealing in such financial products as
<image>
may be specified by the RBI in the manner and format and within the time
frame as prescribed by the RBI;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide information about dealing in such financial products as <image> may be specified by the rbi in the manner and format and within the time frame

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract the prudential norms such as capital adequacy, exposure norms (including large exposure framework), periodical valuation, and all other applic
controls.control_description:
The financial products dealt with by the foreign branches and subsidiaries as well
as IFSCs shall attract the prudential norms such as capital adequacy, exposure
norms (including Large Exposure Framework), periodical valuation, and all other
applicable norms.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to attract the prudential norms such as capital adequacy, exposure norms (including large exposure framework), periodical valuation, and all other applic

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to more stringent among the host and home regulations in respect of prudential norms
controls.control_description:
AIFI shall adhere to more stringent among the host and home
regulations in respect of prudential norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to more stringent among the host and home regulations in respect of prudential norms

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek specific guidance from rbi
controls.control_description:
In case the current norms of the RBI do not specify prudential treatment of any
financial product, the AIFI shall seek specific guidance from RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek specific guidance from rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the laws in india
controls.control_description:
The activities of branches / subsidiaries in foreign jurisdictions and IFSCs shall
be subject to the laws in India, unless specifically exempted by law.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the laws in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
